sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52791" key="kalobate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλο-βᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n52791.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walk on the tight-rope</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:3:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
